form.formComment: Two back was sixth after a quick start, behind The Golden Hook at Bendigo over 1650m in a NR 50 to 55 on April 1 at $26. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Elated at Bendigo over 1650m in a NR 46 to 51 on April 8 at $8. Sure to be there at the business end.

formComments.title: TAB

Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Elated at Bendigo over 1650m in a NR 46 to 51 on April 8 at $8. Sure to be there at the business end.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Surrendered the lead to Shazza Love approaching the 1400m mark.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd (Fr4) over 2160m after showing early pace at Echuca, beaten 3.5 m by Parisian Bandit (2:43.10) in NR up to 37 on April 5 at $11. Two runs back was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1755m after being wide early at Echuca was 7th-15.2 at the bell, beaten 16 m by The Accidental One (2:12.60) in NR up to 36 on March 10 at $14. This looks a far sterner test.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1650m at Bendigo was 8th-12.86 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Elated (1:58.00) in NR 46 to 51 on April 8 at $26. Before that, a game effort when 3rd (Fr4) over 1750m after racing wide at Swan Hill, at the bell was leading 3.2 beaten 1.4 m by Happenstbabeachboy (2:06.10) in NR 45 to 50 on March 31 at $3.90. Drawn favourably and is worth another chance.

Drawn favourably and is worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward at the start to lead throughout.

form.formComment: Back in form at the last couple of outings, two starts back won by a head (Fr2) at this track (2:02.30) beating Mussel Shoals in NR 47 to 50 on March 17 at $12 at the bell was 4th-5.39. Last start just missed, solid effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 1750m at Swan Hill, at the bell was 2nd-2.8 beaten 1.1 m by Over The Line (2:06.60) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $4. Winning claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Two back was fourth after a quick start, behind Kualight at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 49 on March 24 at $8. Then a handy effort when third behind Muselet at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 45 to 50 on April 3 at $2.40. Racing consistently and is capable of going very well.

formComments.comment: Two back was fourth after a quick start, behind Kualight at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 49 on March 24 at $8. Then a handy effort when third behind Muselet at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 45 to 50 on April 3 at $2.40. Racing consistently and is capable of going very well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and contacted marker pegs on the home turn.
Held up around the home turn and early in the home straight.
Inconvenienced in the run to the finish.
Pulled hard through the middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.1 m (Fr1) at Swan Hill (2:06.60) beating Roam in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $7 at the bell was 3rd-4.3. Sure to be further improved and is the testing material.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr5) over 1690m after showing early pace at Kilmore, at the bell was leading 2.33 beaten a head by Janiebquick (2:03.30) in NR 45 to 48 on April 2 at $9.50. Decent effort last start. Shapes as one to consider.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start.
Hung inward and contacted the final marker peg.

form.formComment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 8th (Fr2) over 1770m after showing early speed at Albury, beaten 23 m by My Lady Sarah (2:11.10) in NR up to 50 M on December 31 2024 at $21. Maybe later on.

form.formComment: Began her campaign last start running 4th (Sr1) over 2160m at Echuca beaten 11 m by Mussel Shoals (2:40.00) in NR 45 to 50 on April 5 at $81. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.
